REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1 Valletta Court, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Charles Sherman.

The Court noted that there was an issue with the sequencing of notice but that it is satisfied that notice is sufficient to proceed.
The sale was confirmed at $849,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 3/27/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
